creator: ed@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks for testing, Antoine!

I've just committed the change to remove basename_r(3) from the base system. I also sent a pull request to Sean to fix the build of qemu-user-static on FreeBSD HEAD:

https://github.com/seanbruno/qemu-bsd-user/pull/61

I'm reassigning this bug to Sean to ensure this won't slip off the radar.
